name: @platform/email-runtime
description: Email service abstraction: send interface, template contracts, and delivery provider interface.

readme.summary: Email service abstraction: send interface, template contracts, and delivery provider interface.
responsibilities: Define the typed email send interface and message payload schema
Declare template contract types for transactional and marketing emails
Specify delivery provider interface that concrete adapters must implement
Decouple all platform and feature packages from specific email providers
nonResponsibilities: Does not implement email delivery (owned by adapters-brevo)
Does not manage unsubscribe lists or email preference state
Does not define email template markup or rendering
usage: Imported by feature packages to trigger transactional emails
adapters-brevo implements the provider interface defined here
operationalNotes: Provider interface decouples the platform from a specific email vendor — swapping requires only a new adapter
Template IDs should be treated as stable contracts — verify before renaming
